message:
fix(process,raptorq,cx,chaos): doc corrections, memory optimization in decoder retry, and minor cleanups

process: Fix doc examples to match the synchronous API signature (was
showing async fn with .output().await). Replace yield_now() with 1ms sleep
in the output() polling loop to reduce CPU spin when no progress is made.
Add compile-time API test (tests/compile_test_process.rs).

raptorq/decoder: Replace full dense matrix clone in the inactivation retry
snapshot with RHS-only snapshot. On the rare fallback path, rebuild the
dense matrix from equations via new rebuild_dense_matrix_from_equations()
function. Trades compute for memory -- avoids storing an O(n^2) matrix
clone for a path that rarely triggers.

cx: Use std::iter::successors for cancel_chain() to lazily traverse the
chain without allocating an intermediate Vec.

scope/remote: Update oneshot receivers to mut for new &mut self recv API.

chaos: Remove redundant is_empty() guards on Duration ranges that were
superseded by the subsequent end <= start arithmetic comparison.

Add src/sync/notify_bug_test.rs as a standalone reproduction test for the
Notify drop-and-re-poll bug fixed in the sync commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
